message:
refactor(build-coord): unify command analysis with recursive shell unwrapping

Replace three separate functions (detect_cargo_command, command_uses_rch,
requires_rch_offload) that each independently tokenized command segments
with a unified analyze_command()/CommandAnalysis that does a single pass.
Add recursive shell unwrapping: bash -lc 'cargo test ...' now descends
into the shell payload to detect the inner cargo subcommand and rch
wrapper. Add is_shell_binary, shell_flag_invokes_command, and
shell_command_payload helpers with comprehensive tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
